caption: 九个人争一个词。
scene: Sage sitting at a long meeting table facing a single laptop, four tiny head-shapes arranged across the far edge of the table, one small speech bubble holding the word WE floating in the middle, a wall clock above shifting from a flat line on Sage's face, his cheek resting on one paw.
bible_hook: §2 One stakeholder review where 9 people debate a single word of copy for 40 minutes
rationale: Recent posts hit Sage's solo work moments but not the dreaded big meeting; pivots to a group-review pressure scene with a fresh prop (a debated copy word) instead of buttons, logos, or Figma.
